title: Linux Rare Process Detection (Stacking)
description: Identifies rarely-seen processes on Linux endpoints. Uses the rare value hunting technique (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Sorting/Stacking method) to surface processes that appear fewer than 3 times, which may indicate attacker tooling, post-exploitation binaries, or unauthorized software.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') | stats count as executions by 'Process Name' | sort executions | where executions < 3
